creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
The Makefile for the new aspell port added an option for the ispell wrapper.
Since the wrapper creates an ispell executable, the CONFLICT statement that
was added to be conditional on the selection of the ispell wrapper, but a
second unconditional CONFLICTS was also added that makes it impossible to
install aspell and ispell on hte same system.

How-To-Repeat: 	
N/A
